content.query:
SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

DROP TABLE [EDW].[DIM_EMPLOYEE]
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[DIM_EMPLOYEE]
( 
	[EmployeeID] [nvarchar](50)  NOT NULL,
	[BranchID] [nvarchar](50)  NULL,
	[SalesDistrictID] [nvarchar](50)  NULL,
	[FirstName] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LastName] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[DOB] [datetime]  NULL,
	[HireDate] [datetime]  NULL,
	[Active] [bit]  NULL,
	[City] [nvarchar](50)  NULL,
	[State] [nvarchar](10)  NULL,
	[Zip] [nvarchar](10)  NULL,
	[Email] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Owner] [bit]  NULL,
	[Setter] [bit]  NULL,
	[Verifier] [bit]  NULL,
	[Confirmer] [bit]  NULL,
	[Promoter] [bit]  NULL,
	[SalesRep] [bit]  NULL,
	[Dialer] [bit]  NULL,
	[LP_EmployeeID] int NULL,
	[LP_BranchID] [nvarchar](50)  NULL,
	[LP_SalesDistrictID] [nvarchar](50)  NULL,
	[Division] [nvarchar](10)  NOT NULL,
	[LastUpdateTS] [DATETIME]  NOT NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = REPLICATE
)
GO
